code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut evens = ""
  mut odds = ""
  mut evens_count = 0
  mut odds_count = 0
  mut tok = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut at_end = false
    if i == n
      at_end = true
    end
    mut is_space = false
    if at_end
      is_space = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          is_space = true
        end
      when None
        is_space = true
      end
    end
    if is_space
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          let r = v - (v / 2) * 2
          if r == 0
            if evens_count == 0
              evens = "#{v}"
            else
              evens = "#{evens} #{v}"
            end
            evens_count = evens_count + 1
          else
            if odds_count == 0
              odds = "#{v}"
            else
              odds = "#{odds} #{v}"
            end
            odds_count = odds_count + 1
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("evens=#{evens}")
  println("odds=#{odds}")
end
